com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXSVGBuilder


  • public interface IXSVGBuilder
    Outputs the svg of the diagram after annotating the SVG with the colour indicated for change on the objects that have a change with respect to the comparators registered. The colors to be used are indicated in the changeIXChangedObject

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void buildSVG(java.io.File svgFile, java.util.Set<IXChangedObject> changes, java.lang.String styleSetFile, java.awt.Dimension size)
      Takes the given diagram and outputs the svg of that diagram.

    • Method Detail

      • buildSVG

        void buildSVG(java.io.File svgFile,
              java.util.Set<IXChangedObject> changes,
              java.lang.String styleSetFile,
              java.awt.Dimension size)
       throws java.io.IOException
        Takes the given diagram and outputs the svg of that diagram. It then modifies the SVG to colour the changed objects appropriatly
        Parameters:
        svgFile - the path to the file containing the current diagram for which coloring based on changes is required. On return this argument will contain the current diagram with coloring applied.
        changes - list of changes to draw on the diagram
        styleSetFile - is the name of the file that will be used for transforming the annotated svg result.
        size - is the dimension of the window in which this svg file has to be displayed.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - when the specified file can not be found, read or written to
